# mosaic { #forensicface.mosaic }

`mosaic`

Mosaic-building workflow for aligned faces.

## Functions

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [build_aligned_face_mosaic](#forensicface.mosaic.build_aligned_face_mosaic) | Build a rectangular mosaic of aligned faces using a processor object. |

### build_aligned_face_mosaic { #forensicface.mosaic.build_aligned_face_mosaic }

```python
mosaic.build_aligned_face_mosaic(
    processor,
    img_path_list,
    mosaic_shape,
    border=0.03,
    save_to=None,
    draw_keypoints=False,
)
```

Build a rectangular mosaic of aligned faces using a processor object.
